---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CalNexus
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see in CalNexus.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario in which you need this feature. What problem does it solve? Who benefits from it? How often would you use it?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have an idea of how this could be implemented, describe it here. Feel free to mention specific modules, APIs, or syntax. For example:

```rust
// Sketch of the proposed API
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools (e.g. `bc`, `qalc`, Python's `eval`) here.
